message:
fix: marketplace state sync, operator error surfacing, frontend globals (#7539-#7554) (#7566)

* fix: marketplace state sync — reconcile with backend, cross-tab sync, resilient fetch (#7539-#7543)

- Reconcile installed state against backend dashboards on mount (#7539)
- Gracefully handle 404 when removing already-deleted resources (#7540)
- Always clear local state on remove regardless of dashboardId (#7541)
- Use useSyncExternalStore + storage event for cross-tab sync (#7542)
- Preserve cached/current items on fetch failure instead of clearing (#7543)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: operator error surfacing, cache TTL, pending upgrade detection (#7544-#7550)

- Surface per-cluster errors in REST responses via clusterErrors field (#7544, #7545)
- Emit cluster_error SSE events for failed operator/subscription fetches (#7546)
- Surface error messages in frontend hooks instead of suppressing (#7547)
- Derive pendingUpgrade when installedCSV differs from currentCSV (#7548)
- Use shorter cache TTL (30s) for empty operator results (#7549, #7550)
- Add getOperatorsForClusterWithError and fetchSubscriptionsFromCluster helpers

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: sanitize ref param, SSR-guard globals, clean up meta tags (#7551-#7554)

- Allowlist and normalize ref query param before sending to analytics (#7551)
- Move window.__TTFI_MANIFEST__ assignment into useEffect (#7552)
- Remove dynamically created meta description tag on unmount (#7553)
- Guard window.location access with typeof check for SSR paths (#7554)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
